rules.summary: Payment may depend on open-ended approval or acceptance.
rules.why_risky: Payment can be delayed if approval criteria or timelines are unclear.
rules.suggested_question: Can approval criteria, deemed acceptance, and payment timelines be made objective?
false_positive_checks: check whether a clear payment timeline exists
check whether acceptance criteria are objective

rules.summary: Payment timing or amount may be unclear or one-sided.
rules.why_risky: Unclear payment mechanics create disputes and cash-flow risk.
rules.suggested_question: Can amount, invoice process, due date, and late consequences be stated clearly?
false_positive_checks: check whether fees are set in a separate rate table
